channel.title: Agent Mode on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Agent Mode on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Inline agent mode in preview and more in GitHub Copilot for JetBrains IDEs
item.description:
GitHub Copilot for JetBrains IDEs adds inline agent mode in preview, along with improvements to Next Edit Suggestions and new controls for approving terminal commands and file edits. The update also introduces global auto-approve and other related enhancements.

  • Source: GitHub
